name: Granola Cookies
recipeIngredient: Vanilla extract or almond extract - 1 tsp
recipeInstructions:
1. Place the oven rack about one-third up from the bottom. Preheat the oven to 350 degrees.
2. Line a cookie sheet with parchment paper and lightly grease it.
3. In a large, grease-free bowl, beat the egg whites at a slow steady speed until foamy.
4. Add the cream of tartar to the egg whites and continue beating.
5. Gradually add the brown sugar, sifting it in through your fingertips to ensure it is free of lumps. Beat in the vanilla extract or almond extract.
6. Continue beating until the meringue forms soft peaks.
7. Use a rubber spatula to gently fold in about half a cup of granola at a time until the batter is evenly blended.
8. Drop rounded tablespoonfuls of the batter onto the prepared cookie sheet.
9. Bake for 20 minutes, or until the cookies are brown and set.
10. Press a maraschino cherry into the center of each cookie (if desired) before removing them from the cookie sheet with a spatula while they are still warm.
Yield: about 3 dozen cookies.
